title: Rcavanagh
compiled_truth: Rcavanagh is an external contact at [Nrdc](companies/nrdc). Over the corpus period (2000-08-10 to 2001-12-21), Rcavanagh sent 9 and received 84 emails, totalling 93 interactions.
